channel.title: INFITEX Global Advisory — Insights
channel.description: Plain-English tax, finance and business updates across Australia, India and the UAE.

item.title: UAE corporate tax: when your return is actually due
item.description: There is no single deadline — it falls nine months after your own financial year-end. How to find yours.

item.title: Old vs new regime for FY 2025-26: which is actually lower
item.description: The new regime is the default and tax-free to Rs 12 lakh — but the old regime can still win. How to tell.

item.title: Australian tax time 2025-26: the dates that matter
item.description: Season opens 1 July 2026. Self-lodgers, agent extensions, BAS and super — the calendar to keep.
